Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.data.filter

Class SeriesTypeFieldMatcher

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.data.filter.AbstractObservationFieldMatcher<SeriesType>
org.aavso.tools.vstar.data.filter.SeriesTypeFieldMatcher
All Implemented Interfaces:
IObservationFieldMatcher
public class SeriesTypeFieldMatcher extends AbstractObservationFieldMatcher<SeriesType>
A series type field (band, series) matcher.

  • Method Details

    • getValueUnderTest

      protected SeriesType getValueUnderTest(ValidObservation ob)
      Description copied from class: AbstractObservationFieldMatcher
      Get the value under test. If any conversion must first be done, e.g. from string, this method must handle that.
      Specified by:
      getValueUnderTest in class AbstractObservationFieldMatcher<SeriesType>
      Parameters:
      ob - An observation containing the value.
      Returns:
      The value to be matched against.

    • create

      public IObservationFieldMatcher create(String fieldValue, ObservationMatcherOp op)
      Description copied from interface: IObservationFieldMatcher
      Creates and returns an instance of an observation matcher for the current field matcher type. The returned matcher contains a value-to-be-matched against the expected type given the supplied string field value. If the latter cannot be converted to the expected type, null is returned. The match operator to be used is also included in the returned object.
      Parameters:
      fieldValue - The string field value to be converted to a match object.
      op - The match operator to be used.
      Returns:
      The created matcher or null if the field value does not conform to the type required by the matcher.

    • matches

      public boolean matches(ValidObservation ob)
      Description copied from interface: IObservationFieldMatcher
      Does the specified observation match a test value?
      Parameters:
      ob - The observation under test.
      Returns:
      True or false.

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Description copied from interface: IObservationFieldMatcher
      The display name for this matcher.

    • getType

      public Class<?> getType()
      Description copied from interface: IObservationFieldMatcher
      What is the type of the field to be matched against?
      Returns:
      A class representing a type.

    • getDefaultTestValue

      public String getDefaultTestValue()
      Description copied from interface: IObservationFieldMatcher
      Return a default test value for this matcher, or null if there isn't one. TODO: this should return a T! All the more reason this interface should be replaced by AbstractObservationFieldMatcher, or this interface or method parameterised with T.
      Returns:
      The default test value, or null.

    • getTestValueFromObservation

      public String getTestValueFromObservation(ValidObservation ob)
      Description copied from interface: IObservationFieldMatcher
      Return a test value for this matcher given an observation.
      Parameters:
      ob - The observation from which to extract the test value.
      Returns:
      The test value.
